pictures.title: 秦始皇兵马俑
pictures.summary: 西安临潼的兵马俑坑中，数千尊真人大小的陶俑列阵而立。每一尊面...
pictures.full_text: 西安临潼的兵马俑坑中，数千尊真人大小的陶俑列阵而立。每一尊面容各异，铠甲纹饰清晰可辨，战马昂首嘶鸣。这支地下军团守护秦始皇两千余年，被誉为世界第八大奇迹。
pictures.title_en: Terracotta Army of Qin Shi Huang
pictures.full_text_en: In the pits of Lintong, Xi'an, thousands of life-sized terracotta warriors stand in formation. Each has a unique face, with discernible armor patterns and warhorses rearing and neighing. This underground army has guarded Qin Shi Huang for over two millennia and is hailed as the Eighth Wonder of the World.

pictures.title: 莫高窟壁画
pictures.summary: 敦煌莫高窟四百九十二个洞窟中保存着历代壁画四万五千平方米。飞...
pictures.full_text: 敦煌莫高窟四百九十二个洞窟中保存着历代壁画四万五千平方米。飞天凌空翩跹，佛陀庄严说法，供养人画像栩栩如生。千年风沙未能磨灭这些艺术瑰宝的光彩，丝绸之路的文明在此交汇。
pictures.full_text_en: The 492 caves of the Mogao Caves in Dunhuang preserve 45,000 square meters of murals from various dynasties. Flying apsaras dance through the air, the Buddha preaches solemnly, and donor portraits are vividly lifelike. A thousand years of wind and sand have not dimmed the brilliance of these artistic treasures, where Silk Road civilizations converge.

pictures.title: 布达拉宫
pictures.summary: 拉萨红山之巅的布达拉宫巍峨耸立，红白相间的宫墙在蓝天映衬下格...
pictures.full_text: 拉萨红山之巅的布达拉宫巍峨耸立，红白相间的宫墙在蓝天映衬下格外庄严。十三层宫殿依山而建，内藏大量佛经和珍宝，达赖喇嘛的冬宫见证了西藏政教合一的历史。
pictures.full_text_en: The Potala Palace atop Lhasa's Red Mountain towers majestically, its red-and-white walls strikingly solemn against the blue sky. The thirteen-story palace is built into the mountainside, housing vast collections of Buddhist scriptures and treasures. The Dalai Lama's winter palace bears witness to Tibet's history of unified religious and political rule.

pictures.title: 苏州古典园林
pictures.summary: 拙政园内曲廊回环，漏窗借景，一池碧水倒映着太湖石假山。亭台楼...
pictures.full_text: 拙政园内曲廊回环，漏窗借景，一池碧水倒映着太湖石假山。亭台楼阁错落有致，四季花木精心布置，方寸之间营造出山林的意境，体现了中国文人追求天人合一的审美理想。
pictures.full_text_en: In the Humble Administrator's Garden, winding corridors loop back on themselves, lattice windows borrow scenery, and a pool of emerald water reflects Taihu stone rockeries. Pavilions and towers are arranged with refined elegance, seasonal flowers and trees are meticulously placed, creating the atmosphere of mountain forests within a confined space—embodying the Chinese literati's aesthetic ideal of harmony between humanity and nature.

pictures.title: 丽江古城
pictures.summary: 纳西族古城依山傍水而建，青石板路蜿蜒曲折，溪流穿街过巷。木府...
pictures.full_text: 纳西族古城依山傍水而建，青石板路蜿蜒曲折，溪流穿街过巷。木府飞檐翘角，东巴文字刻于门楣，四方街上纳西老人悠然品茶，这座八百年古城完整保留了少数民族的生活风貌。
pictures.full_text_en: The Naxi ancient town is built against the hills and along the water, with flagstone paths winding and streams flowing through streets and alleys. The Mu Residence features upturned eaves, Dongba script is carved on lintels, and Naxi elders sip tea leisurely on Square Street. This 800-year-old town fully preserves the lifestyle of an ethnic minority.

pictures.title: 龙门石窟
pictures.summary: 洛阳伊水两岸的崖壁上，十万尊造像密布如蜂巢。卢舍那大佛高十七...
pictures.full_text: 洛阳伊水两岸的崖壁上，十万尊造像密布如蜂巢。卢舍那大佛高十七米，面容丰润慈祥，据说是以武则天为原型雕刻。北魏至唐代的石刻艺术在此汇聚，见证了中国佛教艺术的巅峰。
pictures.full_text_en: The Huizhou-style ancient villages of Wuyuan in Jiangxi feature white walls and dark tiles nestled among green hills and clear waters, with horse-head walls rising and falling like an ink-wash painting. Ancient camphor trees canopy Aoxiao, exquisite wood carvings adorn Sixi Yancun, and when rapeseed flowers bloom the fields turn golden. Wuyuan is the epitome of China's most beautiful countryside and a living fossil of Huizhou culture.

pictures.title: 庐山
pictures.summary: 庐山雄峙长江之滨，奇峰峻岭云雾缭绕。白鹿洞书院千年弦歌不绝，...
pictures.full_text: 庐山雄峙长江之滨，奇峰峻岭云雾缭绕。白鹿洞书院千年弦歌不绝，东林寺净土宗祖庭香火鼎盛。别墅群掩映在松柏之间，文人墨客在此留下无数诗篇，自然与人文在此完美融合。
pictures.full_text_en: Mount Lu stands majestically on the banks of the Yangtze River, with strange peaks and steep ridges shrouded in mist. White Deer Grotto Academy has echoed with learning for a millennium, and Donglin Temple, the ancestral court of Pure Land Buddhism, burns with incense. Villas are hidden among pines and cypresses, and literati have left countless poems here—nature and culture merge perfectly.

pictures.title: 泰姬陵
pictures.summary: 阿格拉的亚穆纳河畔，泰姬陵通体洁白如玉，四座宣礼塔对称矗立。...
pictures.full_text: 阿格拉的亚穆纳河畔，泰姬陵通体洁白如玉，四座宣礼塔对称矗立。沙贾汗为亡妻修建的陵墓融合了伊斯兰和印度建筑风格，镶嵌的宝石在月光下闪烁，是永恒爱情的绝美象征。
pictures.full_text_en: On the banks of the Yamuna River in Agra, the Taj Mahal gleams pure white as jade, with four minarets standing symmetrically. The mausoleum built by Shah Jahan for his beloved wife blends Islamic and Indian architectural styles, with inlaid gemstones glittering in the moonlight—a breathtaking symbol of eternal love.

pictures.title: 吴哥窟
pictures.summary: 柬埔寨热带丛林中，吴哥窟的五座莲花塔尖直插云霄。回廊上的浮雕...
pictures.full_text: 柬埔寨热带丛林中，吴哥窟的五座莲花塔尖直插云霄。回廊上的浮雕讲述着印度教神话，仙女阿帕莎拉的微笑穿越千年。高棉帝国的辉煌凝固在这座世界上最大的宗教建筑中。
pictures.full_text_en: In the tropical jungles of Cambodia, the five lotus-bud towers of Angkor Wat soar into the sky. Bas-reliefs on the corridors narrate Hindu myths, and the smiles of apsaras transcend a millennium. The glory of the Khmer Empire is frozen in the world's largest religious monument.

pictures.title: 京都金阁寺
pictures.summary: 镜湖池畔，金阁寺三层楼阁贴满金箔，倒映在碧波之中如梦似幻。底...
pictures.full_text: 镜湖池畔，金阁寺三层楼阁贴满金箔，倒映在碧波之中如梦似幻。底层贵族风格的法水院、中层武家风格的潮音洞、顶层禅宗风格的究竟顶，三种建筑风格和谐统一，是日本美学的极致。
pictures.full_text_en: Beside the Mirror Pond, the three-story pavilion of Kinkaku-ji is covered in gold leaf, reflected in the emerald waters like a dream. The aristocratic-style Hōsui-in on the first floor, the samurai-style Chōon-dō on the second, and the Zen-style Kukkyo-chō on the third—three architectural styles harmoniously unified, representing the pinnacle of Japanese aesthetics.

pictures.title: 婆罗浮屠
pictures.summary: 印度尼西亚爪哇岛上的婆罗浮屠是世界上最大的佛教遗迹。九层佛塔...
pictures.full_text: 印度尼西亚爪哇岛上的婆罗浮屠是世界上最大的佛教遗迹。九层佛塔层层递进，两千六百多块浮雕讲述佛陀生平，五百零四尊佛像端坐壁龛之中，朝圣者沿回廊拾级而上，完成一场心灵之旅。
pictures.full_text_en: Borobudur on the island of Java, Indonesia, is the world's largest Buddhist monument. Nine tiers of stupas ascend step by step, over 2,600 relief panels narrate the life of the Buddha, and 504 Buddha statues sit serenely in niches. Pilgrims ascend along the corridors, completing a spiritual journey.

pictures.title: 波斯波利斯
pictures.summary: 伊朗法尔斯省的平原上，大流士一世的宫殿遗址气势恢宏。万国之门...
pictures.full_text: 伊朗法尔斯省的平原上，大流士一世的宫殿遗址气势恢宏。万国之门的公牛柱头威严依旧，觐见阶梯上的朝贡浮雕栩栩如生，二十个属国的使节携贡物前来，波斯帝国的荣光铭刻在石壁之上。
pictures.full_text_en: On the plains of Fars Province, Iran, the ruins of Darius I's palace are magnificent. The bull-headed capitals of the Gate of All Nations remain imposing, the tribute-bearing reliefs on the Apadana staircase are vividly lifelike, and envoys from twenty subject nations approach with gifts—the glory of the Persian Empire is carved into stone.

pictures.title: 伊斯坦布尔圣索菲亚
pictures.summary: 圣索菲亚大教堂的穹顶高悬五十六米，金色马赛克在昏暗中闪烁。拜...
pictures.full_text: 圣索菲亚大教堂的穹顶高悬五十六米，金色马赛克在昏暗中闪烁。拜占庭皇帝查士丁尼建造的这座奇迹，后来成为清真寺，如今是博物馆，基督教与伊斯兰文明在此交汇融合。
pictures.full_text_en: The dome of Hagia Sophia soars fifty-six meters high, with golden mosaics gleaming in the dimness. This marvel built by Byzantine Emperor Justinian later became a mosque and is now a museum—Christian and Islamic civilizations converge and merge here.

pictures.title: 雅典卫城
pictures.summary: 雅典卫城矗立在石灰岩山丘之上，帕特农神庙的多利安柱廊在夕阳中...
pictures.full_text: 雅典卫城矗立在石灰岩山丘之上，帕特农神庙的多利安柱廊在夕阳中泛着金色光芒。菲迪亚斯设计的这座神庙供奉着雅典娜女神，是古希腊建筑艺术的最高成就和西方文明的象征。
pictures.full_text_en: The Acropolis of Athens stands atop a limestone hill, the Doric colonnade of the Parthenon glowing golden in the sunset. This temple designed by Phidias, dedicated to the goddess Athena, is the supreme achievement of ancient Greek architectural art and a symbol of Western civilization.

pictures.title: 罗马斗兽场
pictures.summary: 罗马斗兽场椭圆形建筑可容纳五万观众，四层拱券结构雄伟壮观。角...
pictures.full_text: 罗马斗兽场椭圆形建筑可容纳五万观众，四层拱券结构雄伟壮观。角斗士在沙场上搏命厮杀，观众席上欢声雷动。这座弗拉维安圆形剧场是罗马帝国工程技术的杰作，至今仍震撼人心。
pictures.full_text_en: The eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD buried Pompeii under volcanic ash; when excavated in the eighteenth century, streets, houses, and frescoes were remarkably preserved. Unbaked bread remained in bakeries, and victims' bodies left cavities in the ash. Pompeii is a frozen moment of Roman daily life—time stopped here.

pictures.title: 巴黎圣母院
pictures.summary: 塞纳河畔的巴黎圣母院是哥特式建筑的典范，飞扶壁如巨臂支撑着高...
pictures.full_text: 塞纳河畔的巴黎圣母院是哥特式建筑的典范，飞扶壁如巨臂支撑着高耸的穹顶。玫瑰花窗在阳光下投射出斑斓光影，石像鬼俯瞰巴黎街巷，八百年的风雨未能磨灭这座大教堂的庄严。
pictures.full_text_en: Notre-Dame de Paris on the banks of the Seine is a masterpiece of Gothic architecture, with flying buttresses like giant arms supporting the soaring vault. Rose windows cast kaleidoscopic light in the sun, gargoyles overlook Parisian streets, and eight centuries of wind and rain have not diminished this cathedral's solemnity.

pictures.title: 凡尔赛宫
pictures.summary: 路易十四的凡尔赛宫是绝对君权的象征，镜厅中三百五十七面镜子映...
pictures.full_text: 路易十四的凡尔赛宫是绝对君权的象征，镜厅中三百五十七面镜子映照着水晶吊灯的璀璨光芒。几何式花园绵延数公里，喷泉和雕塑点缀其间，欧洲各国宫廷纷纷效仿其奢华风格。
pictures.full_text_en: Louis XIV's Palace of Versailles is a symbol of absolute monarchy, where 357 mirrors in the Hall of Mirrors reflect the brilliance of crystal chandeliers. Geometric gardens stretch for kilometers, adorned with fountains and sculptures, and courts across Europe imitated its lavish style.

pictures.title: 阿尔罕布拉宫
pictures.summary: 格拉纳达山丘上的阿尔罕布拉宫是伊斯兰建筑在欧洲的绝唱。蜂巢状...
pictures.full_text: 格拉纳达山丘上的阿尔罕布拉宫是伊斯兰建筑在欧洲的绝唱。蜂巢状穹顶精雕细琢，阿拉伯书法环绕拱门，桃金娘中庭池水如镜映照着钟楼，摩尔人最后的宫殿美得令人屏息。
pictures.full_text_en: The Alhambra on the hills of Granada is the swan song of Islamic architecture in Europe. Honeycomb domes are exquisitely carved, Arabic calligraphy frames archways, and the Court of the Myrtles reflects the tower in mirror-still water—the last palace of the Moors is breathtakingly beautiful.

pictures.title: 巨石阵
pictures.summary: 索尔兹伯里平原上，巨石阵的蓝砂岩和萨尔森石围成同心圆环。夏至...
pictures.full_text: 索尔兹伯里平原上，巨石阵的蓝砂岩和萨尔森石围成同心圆环。夏至日出时阳光穿过石门，冬至日落余晖映照祭坛石。新石器时代的人们如何搬运和竖立这些数十吨重的巨石至今仍是谜。
pictures.full_text_en: On the Salisbury Plain, bluestones and sarsens of Stonehenge form concentric circles. At summer solstice sunrise, sunlight passes through the stone gate; at winter solstice sunset, the afterglow illuminates the altar stone. How Neolithic people transported and erected these multi-ton megaliths remains a mystery.

pictures.title: 吉萨金字塔群
pictures.summary: 吉萨高原上三座金字塔巍然矗立，胡夫大金字塔原高一百四十六米，...
pictures.full_text: 吉萨高原上三座金字塔巍然矗立，胡夫大金字塔原高一百四十六米，由二百三十万块石灰岩砌成。狮身人面像守望尼罗河四千余年，法老的永恒居所是人类建筑史上最壮观的丰碑。
pictures.full_text_en: The twin towers of Cologne Cathedral soar 157 meters into the sky, with Gothic pointed arches and flying buttresses forming an ingenious structural system. Construction lasted over 600 years, and stained glass windows cast colorful light in the sun. Germany's greatest Gothic building is a crystallization of medieval faith and engineering wisdom.

pictures.title: 维多利亚瀑布
pictures.summary: 赞比西河在赞比亚与津巴布韦交界处跌入百米深谷，水雾升腾如云，...
pictures.full_text: 赞比西河在赞比亚与津巴布韦交界处跌入百米深谷，水雾升腾如云，彩虹横跨峡谷。当地人称之为雷鸣之烟，瀑布宽达一点七公里，是世界上最壮观的瀑布之一，震撼着每一位到访者。
pictures.full_text_en: On a tidal island off the Normandy coast, a Gothic abbey stands like a mirage. At high tide, seawater surrounds the hill as an isolated island; at low tide, sandy flats connect it to the mainland. Benedictine monks have practiced here for a millennium, and pilgrims have risked quicksand to reach the holy site. Mont Saint-Michel is France's most spectacular cultural landscape.

pictures.title: 塞伦盖蒂迁徙
pictures.summary: 每年百万头角马和数十万头斑马在塞伦盖蒂草原上迁徙，扬起的尘土...
pictures.full_text: 每年百万头角马和数十万头斑马在塞伦盖蒂草原上迁徙，扬起的尘土遮天蔽日。鳄鱼在马拉河中潜伏等待，猎豹在草原上飞奔追猎，地球上最壮观的野生动物大迁徙在此上演。
pictures.full_text_en: Prague Castle on the banks of the Vltava overlooks the Old Town, and Baroque statues on Charles Bridge loom in the morning mist. The astronomical clock on Old Town Square performs the Dance of Death every hour, and Gothic and Baroque buildings layer and intertwine. Prague is one of Europe's best-preserved medieval cities.

pictures.title: 乞力马扎罗山
pictures.summary: 非洲最高峰乞力马扎罗山矗立在坦桑尼亚大草原上，赤道附近的雪山...
pictures.full_text: 非洲最高峰乞力马扎罗山矗立在坦桑尼亚大草原上，赤道附近的雪山奇景举世罕见。冰川从五十八百九十五米的峰顶缓缓流淌，山脚下大象和长颈鹿悠然漫步，海明威的雪在此永恒。
pictures.full_text_en: Towers stand thick along the red walls by the Moscow River, and golden domes of the cathedral cluster gleam inside the Kremlin. Ivan the Great Bell Tower rises 81 meters, and the 200-ton Tsar Bell has never been rung. From Grand Prince of Moscow to Soviet leader, the Kremlin has witnessed Russia's entire history from principality to superpower.

pictures.title: 马拉喀什老城
pictures.summary: 摩洛哥马拉喀什的德吉玛广场上，蛇charmer、杂技艺人和香...
pictures.full_text: 摩洛哥马拉喀什的德吉玛广场上，蛇charmer、杂技艺人和香料商人各显神通。红色城墙环绕着迷宫般的街巷，清真寺宣礼塔高耸入云，北非的千年古城至今仍充满生机与活力。
pictures.full_text_en: The red dome of the Santa Maria del Fiore was designed by Brunelleschi, built with a double-shell structure without scaffolding. The Uffizi Gallery houses Botticelli's Venus and Leonardo's angels, and Medici patronage made Florence the cradle of the Renaissance.

pictures.title: 马丘比丘
pictures.summary: 秘鲁安第斯山脉海拔两千四百米的山脊上，印加古城马丘比丘云雾缭...
pictures.full_text: 秘鲁安第斯山脉海拔两千四百米的山脊上，印加古城马丘比丘云雾缭绕。石砌建筑精密契合无缝隙，梯田沿山坡层层展开，太阳神庙在冬至日精准对准日出方向，印加人的智慧令世人惊叹。
pictures.full_text_en: Over 140,000 rock carvings on the cliffs of Valcamonica, Italy, span from the Neolithic to the Iron Age. Hunters chase deer, warriors fight with swords, priests conduct ceremonies—these petroglyphs record 8,000 years of life and belief of Alpine peoples.

pictures.title: 奇琴伊察
pictures.summary: 尤卡坦半岛的丛林中，玛雅金字塔卡斯蒂略在春分和秋分日投下蛇形...
pictures.full_text: 尤卡坦半岛的丛林中，玛雅金字塔卡斯蒂略在春分和秋分日投下蛇形光影。库库尔坎羽蛇神沿阶梯蜿蜒而下，球场上的石环见证着生死攸关的球赛，玛雅天文历法的精确令人叹服。
pictures.full_text_en: Porto's old town along the Douro River cascades up the hillside, with red roofs and blue tile facades shimmering in the sun. The Luís I Bridge spans the river valley, and the aroma of aging port wine wafts from cellars. Portugal's second city is renowned for wine and architecture.

pictures.title: 加拉帕戈斯群岛
pictures.summary: 太平洋上的加拉帕戈斯群岛是进化的活实验室。巨龟在火山岩上缓慢...
pictures.full_text: 太平洋上的加拉帕戈斯群岛是进化的活实验室。巨龟在火山岩上缓慢爬行，海鬣蜥潜入海底啃食海藻，蓝脚鲣鸟跳着滑稽的求偶舞。达尔文在此获得灵感，写出了改变世界的物种起源。
pictures.full_text_en: The Würzburg Residence is the pinnacle of South German Baroque architecture. The ceiling fresco in the staircase hall, painted by Tiepolo, depicts the splendor of four continents. The Mirror Cabinet uses colored stucco to simulate marble with deceptive realism. This prince-bishop's palace showcases the luxury and taste of eighteenth-century German courts.

pictures.title: 伊瓜苏瀑布
pictures.summary: 阿根廷与巴西边境的伊瓜苏瀑布由二百七十五条瀑布组成，魔鬼咽喉...
pictures.full_text: 阿根廷与巴西边境的伊瓜苏瀑布由二百七十五条瀑布组成，魔鬼咽喉段水势最为凶猛。水雾弥漫如暴风骤雨，彩虹在瀑布间此起彼伏，亚热带雨林环绕着这片水之奇观，令人叹为观止。
pictures.title_en: Banks of the Danube in Budapest
pictures.full_text_en: The Danube divides Budapest in two: on the western Buda bank, Fisherman's Bastion and Matthias Church stand atop the hill; on the eastern Pest bank, the Parliament Building unfolds its Neo-Gothic grandeur along the river. The Széchenyi Chain Bridge connects the two sides, and the city's illuminated nightscape is truly the Pearl of the Danube.

pictures.title: 黄石国家公园
pictures.summary: 怀俄明州的黄石公园拥有世界上最大的间歇泉群，老忠实泉每隔九十...
pictures.full_text: 怀俄明州的黄石公园拥有世界上最大的间歇泉群，老忠实泉每隔九十分钟喷发一次。大棱镜温泉色彩斑斓如调色板，野牛群在硫磺池旁悠闲吃草，火山口下的超级火山蕴藏着巨大的地质能量。
pictures.title_en: Old and New Towns of Edinburgh
pictures.full_text_en: Edinburgh Castle crowns a volcanic rock overlooking the city, and the Royal Mile's cobblestone path stretches from the castle to the Palace of Holyroodhouse. The New Town's Georgian architecture is orderly and elegant, the Old Town's medieval lanes are deep and winding—two cities coexist harmoniously in the same space, and the spirit of Scotland converges here.

pictures.title: 自由女神像
pictures.summary: 纽约港入口处的自由女神像高擎火炬，右手持独立宣言，铜绿色长袍...
pictures.full_text: 纽约港入口处的自由女神像高擎火炬，右手持独立宣言，铜绿色长袍在海风中飘动。法国赠送给美国的这座雕像高九十三米，是自由与民主的象征，曾迎接数百万移民踏上新大陆。
pictures.full_text_en: In the fourteenth century, the popes moved from Rome to Avignon, building this Gothic palace on the banks of the Rhône. The Palais des Papes is vast as a fortress, with frescoes and tapestries adorning the papal chambers. Seven popes ruled Christendom from here, and the Avignon Papacy transformed the medieval balance between papal and royal power.

pictures.title: 科隆大教堂
pictures.summary: 科隆大教堂的双塔高耸入云达一百五十七米，哥特式尖拱与飞扶壁构...
pictures.full_text: 科隆大教堂的双塔高耸入云达一百五十七米，哥特式尖拱与飞扶壁构成了精巧的力学体系。教堂建设历时六百余年，彩色玻璃窗在阳光下投射出斑斓光影，这座德国最伟大的哥特建筑是中世纪信仰与工程智慧的结晶。
pictures.full_text_en: Three pyramids stand majestically on the Giza Plateau. The Great Pyramid of Khufu originally rose 146 meters, built from 2.3 million limestone blocks. The Sphinx has watched over the Nile for over 4,000 years. The pharaohs' eternal dwellings are the most spectacular monuments in human architectural history.

pictures.title: 圣米歇尔山
pictures.summary: 诺曼底海岸的潮间岛上，哥特式修道院如海市蜃楼般矗立。涨潮时海...
pictures.full_text: 诺曼底海岸的潮间岛上，哥特式修道院如海市蜃楼般矗立。涨潮时海水将山丘围成孤岛，退潮时沙滩与大陆相连。本笃会修士在此修行千年，朝圣者涉险穿越流沙前往圣地，圣米歇尔山是法国最壮观的文化景观。
pictures.full_text_en: The Zambezi River plunges into a hundred-meter gorge at the Zambia-Zimbabwe border, sending up mist like clouds with rainbows spanning the canyon. Locals call it "The Smoke That Thunders." At 1.7 kilometers wide, it is one of the world's most spectacular waterfalls, awe-inspiring every visitor.

pictures.title: 布拉格历史中心
pictures.summary: 伏尔塔瓦河畔的布拉格城堡俯瞰着老城，查理大桥上的巴洛克雕像在...
pictures.full_text: 伏尔塔瓦河畔的布拉格城堡俯瞰着老城，查理大桥上的巴洛克雕像在晨雾中若隐若现。老城广场的天文钟每到整点便上演死亡之舞，哥特式与巴洛克建筑层叠交织，布拉格是欧洲保存最完好的中世纪城市之一。
pictures.full_text_en: Each year, over a million wildebeest and hundreds of thousands of zebras migrate across the Serengeti plains, raising dust that blots out the sky. Crocodiles lurk in the Mara River, cheetahs sprint across the grasslands, and Earth's most spectacular wildlife migration unfolds here.

pictures.title: 克里姆林宫
pictures.summary: 莫斯科河畔的红墙上塔楼林立，克里姆林宫内教堂群金顶闪耀。伊凡...
pictures.full_text: 莫斯科河畔的红墙上塔楼林立，克里姆林宫内教堂群金顶闪耀。伊凡大帝钟楼高八十一米，重达二百吨的沙皇钟从未敲响。从莫斯科大公到苏联领袖，克里姆林宫见证了俄罗斯从公国到超级大国的全部历史。
pictures.full_text_en: Africa's highest peak, Mount Kilimanjaro, stands on the Tanzanian savanna, its snow-capped summit near the equator a rare global wonder. Glaciers flow slowly from the 5,895-meter peak, while elephants and giraffes stroll at its foot. Hemingway's snow endures here eternally.

pictures.title: 佛罗伦萨历史中心
pictures.summary: 圣母百花大教堂的红色穹顶由布鲁内莱斯基设计，不设脚手架而用双...
pictures.full_text: 圣母百花大教堂的红色穹顶由布鲁内莱斯基设计，不设脚手架而用双层壳体结构建成。乌菲兹美术馆收藏了波提切利的维纳斯与达芬奇的天使，美第奇家族的赞助让佛罗伦萨成为文艺复兴的摇篮。
pictures.full_text_en: In Marrakesh's Djemaa el-Fna square, snake charmers, acrobats, and spice merchants each show their skills. Red walls surround labyrinthine streets, mosque minarets soar into the clouds, and this millennium-old North African city remains vibrant and alive.

pictures.title: 圣彼得大教堂
pictures.summary: 梵蒂冈圣彼得大教堂的穹顶由米开朗基罗设计，直径四十二米如苍穹...
pictures.full_text: 梵蒂冈圣彼得大教堂的穹顶由米开朗基罗设计，直径四十二米如苍穹覆盖祭坛。贝尔尼尼的青铜华盖高耸于教皇祭坛之上， Pietà雕像中圣母的悲伤穿越五百年的时光，这是基督教世界最宏伟的教堂。
pictures.full_text_en: Africa's highest peak, Mount Kilimanjaro, stands on the Tanzanian savanna, its snow-capped summit near the equator a rare global wonder. Glaciers flow slowly from the 5,895-meter peak, while elephants and giraffes stroll at its foot. The vertical ecological zones from tropical rainforest to alpine glacier are astonishing.

pictures.title: 阿尔卑斯山壁画
pictures.summary: 意大利瓦尔卡莫尼卡的岩壁上刻有超过十四万幅岩画，从新石器时代...
pictures.full_text: 意大利瓦尔卡莫尼卡的岩壁上刻有超过十四万幅岩画，从新石器时代延续至铁器时代。猎人追逐鹿群，武士持剑格斗，祭司主持仪式，这些岩画记录了阿尔卑斯山区先民八千年的生活与信仰。
pictures.full_text_en: The Virunga Mountains of the Democratic Republic of the Congo are shrouded in mist, where mountain gorillas quietly nibble tender leaves in bamboo forests. Silverback males guard their families, and infants play in their mothers' arms. With only about a thousand mountain gorillas remaining worldwide, Virunga is their last refuge, and conservation efforts face severe challenges.

pictures.title: 波尔图历史中心
pictures.summary: 杜罗河畔的波尔图老城沿山坡层叠而上，红色屋顶与蓝色瓷砖立面在...
pictures.full_text: 杜罗河畔的波尔图老城沿山坡层叠而上，红色屋顶与蓝色瓷砖立面在阳光下交相辉映。路易一世大桥横跨河谷，酒窖中陈酿的波特酒香气四溢，葡萄牙第二大城市以酒与建筑闻名于世。
pictures.full_text_en: Lake Malawi is the world's ninth-largest lake, home to over 1,000 species of cichlid fish, colorful as swimming gems. These fish radiated from a common ancestor over tens of thousands of years, serving as a living textbook for Darwin's theory of evolution. Lake Malawi is a global hotspot for freshwater biodiversity.

pictures.title: 维尔茨堡宫
pictures.summary: 维尔茨堡宫是南德巴洛克建筑的巅峰之作，阶梯大厅的天顶画由提埃...
pictures.full_text: 维尔茨堡宫是南德巴洛克建筑的巅峰之作，阶梯大厅的天顶画由提埃波罗绘制，描绘了四大洲的盛景。镜厅中用彩色石膏模拟大理石效果以假乱真，这座主教宫殿展现了十八世纪德国宫廷的奢华与品味。
pictures.full_text_en: Great Zimbabwe is the largest ancient stone construction in sub-Saharan Africa, with granite blocks fitted tightly without mortar. Within the elliptical enclosure once stood a prosperous trading city, through which gold and ivory were transported to the Indian Ocean coast—an outstanding witness to medieval African civilization.

pictures.title: 布达佩斯多瑙河两岸
pictures.summary: 多瑙河将布达佩斯一分为二，西岸布达的渔人堡与马加什教堂矗立于...
pictures.full_text: 多瑙河将布达佩斯一分为二，西岸布达的渔人堡与马加什教堂矗立于山丘之上，东岸佩斯的国会大厦沿河岸展开新哥特式的壮丽轮廓。塞切尼链桥连接两岸，城市夜景灯火璀璨，多瑙河明珠名不虚传。
pictures.full_text_en: Timbuktu in Mali was once the most important center of scholarship and trade in West Africa, with Sankore University housing hundreds of thousands of Arabic manuscripts. Salt merchants brought salt blocks from the Sahara in exchange for gold and slaves, mud-brick minarets of mosques shimmered in the desert heat, and Timbuktu was a beacon of Islamic civilization in Africa.

pictures.title: 爱丁堡老城与新城
pictures.summary: 爱丁堡城堡雄踞于火山岩上俯瞰全城，皇家一英里石板路从城堡延伸...
pictures.full_text: 爱丁堡城堡雄踞于火山岩上俯瞰全城，皇家一英里石板路从城堡延伸至荷里路德宫。新城的乔治亚风格建筑整齐优雅，老城的中世纪巷道幽深曲折，两座城市在同一空间中和谐共存，苏格兰的精神在此凝聚。
pictures.full_text_en: The eleven churches of Lalibela in Ethiopia were carved downward from red volcanic rock, with the cross-shaped Church of St. George sculpted from a single massive stone. Pilgrims walk barefoot down stone steps into dim prayer spaces, candlelight illuminates ancient frescoes—this is Africa's most awe-inspiring Christian holy site.

pictures.title: 阿维尼翁教皇宫
pictures.summary: 十四世纪教皇从罗马迁至阿维尼翁，在罗讷河畔建造了这座哥特式宫...
pictures.full_text: 十四世纪教皇从罗马迁至阿维尼翁，在罗讷河畔建造了这座哥特式宫殿。教皇宫规模宏大如堡垒，壁画与挂毯装饰着教皇寝殿，七任教皇在此统治基督教世界，阿维尼翁之囚改变了中世纪教权与王权的格局。
pictures.full_text_en: On Gorée Island off Dakar, the narrow Door of No Return in the Slave House faces the sea, through which millions of Africans were loaded onto slave ships. Pink colonial buildings and tropical flowers cannot conceal the pain of history. Gorée Island is the most sorrowful witness to the transatlantic slave trade, reminding humanity never to forget this dark chapter.

pictures.title: 乞力马扎罗国家公园
pictures.summary: 非洲最高峰乞力马扎罗山矗立在坦桑尼亚大草原上，赤道附近的雪山...
pictures.full_text: 非洲最高峰乞力马扎罗山矗立在坦桑尼亚大草原上，赤道附近的雪山奇景举世罕见。冰川从五千八百九十五米的峰顶缓缓流淌，山脚下大象和长颈鹿悠然漫步，从热带雨林到高山冰川的垂直生态带令人惊叹。
pictures.full_text_en: Lake Turkana in northwestern Kenya is a great lake in the world's most arid region, its jade waters gleaming amid volcanic rock. Paleoanthropologists have discovered Homo habilis fossils dating back 2.5 million years here. The Lake Turkana region is one of the most important fossil sites for the study of human origins.

pictures.title: 维龙加火山山地
pictures.summary: 刚果民主共和国的维龙加山地云雾缭绕，山地大猩猩在竹林中安静地...
pictures.full_text: 刚果民主共和国的维龙加山地云雾缭绕，山地大猩猩在竹林中安静地啃食嫩叶。银背猩猩守护着家族，幼崽在母亲怀中嬉戏。全球仅存千余头山地大猩猩，维龙加是它们最后的避难所，保护工作面临严峻挑战。
pictures.full_text_en: Robben Island off Cape Town was once a place of exile for political prisoners, where Mandela was held for eighteen years. In his tiny cell, he persisted in studying and writing, leading the anti-apartheid movement. Robben Island is now a museum, bearing witness to humanity's unyielding pursuit of freedom and dignity.

pictures.title: 马拉维湖国家公园
pictures.summary: 马拉维湖是世界第九大湖，湖中栖息着超过一千种慈鲷鱼，色彩斑斓...
pictures.full_text: 马拉维湖是世界第九大湖，湖中栖息着超过一千种慈鲷鱼，色彩斑斓如游动的宝石。这些鱼类由同一祖先在数万年间辐射演化而来，是达尔文进化论的活教材，马拉维湖是淡水生物多样性的全球热点。
pictures.full_text_en: The Ngorongoro Crater, 20 kilometers in diameter, is the world's largest intact volcanic caldera. Grasslands, lakes, and forests coexist within, lions and rhinos roam the crater floor, and Maasai herders graze cattle along the rim—a unique landscape of African wildlife and human coexistence.

pictures.title: 津巴布韦大遗址
pictures.summary: 津巴布韦大遗址是撒哈拉以南非洲最大的古代石砌建筑群，花岗岩石...
pictures.full_text: 津巴布韦大遗址是撒哈拉以南非洲最大的古代石砌建筑群，花岗岩石块不施灰浆却严丝合缝。椭圆形围墙内曾是一座繁荣的贸易城市，黄金与象牙经此运往印度洋海岸，这是中世纪非洲文明的杰出见证。
pictures.full_text_en: Ramesses II carved Abu Simbel into the hillside on the banks of the Nile, with four 20-meter seated pharaoh statues guarding the entrance. Twice a year, sunlight penetrates the 60-meter-deep sanctuary to illuminate three of the four statues within. UNESCO led the entire temple's relocation to save it from flooding by the Aswan High Dam.

pictures.title: 廷巴克图古城
pictures.summary: 马里廷巴克图曾是西非最重要的学术与贸易中心，桑科雷大学收藏了...
pictures.full_text: 马里廷巴克图曾是西非最重要的学术与贸易中心，桑科雷大学收藏了数十万册阿拉伯语手稿。盐商从撒哈拉运来盐块换取黄金与奴隶，清真寺的泥砖尖塔在沙漠热浪中闪烁，廷巴克图是伊斯兰文明在非洲的灯塔。
pictures.full_text_en: The medina of Fez is the world's oldest continuously inhabited medieval city, with 9,000 alleyways winding like a labyrinth. Stone vats in leather tanneries are arranged like a palette, coppersmiths hammer out exquisite lamps in their shops, and the University of Al-Qarawiyyin, founded in 859 AD, is the world's oldest continuously operating university.

pictures.title: 拉利贝拉岩石教堂
pictures.summary: 埃塞俄比亚拉利贝拉的十一座教堂从红色火山岩中向下开凿而成，十...
pictures.full_text: 埃塞俄比亚拉利贝拉的十一座教堂从红色火山岩中向下开凿而成，十字形的圣乔治教堂如巨石中的雕塑。朝圣者赤脚走过石阶进入幽暗的祈祷空间，烛光映照着古老的壁画，这里是非洲最令人震撼的基督教圣地。
pictures.full_text_en: On a ridge at 2,400 meters in the Peruvian Andes, the Inca citadel of Machu Picchu is shrouded in mist. Stone walls fit together seamlessly without mortar, terraces cascade down the mountainside, and the Temple of the Sun precisely aligns with the winter solstice sunrise. The ingenuity of the Inca astonishes the world.

pictures.title: 塞内加尔戈雷岛
pictures.summary: 达喀尔外海的戈雷岛上，奴隶之屋的窄门通向大海，数百万非洲人从...
pictures.full_text: 达喀尔外海的戈雷岛上，奴隶之屋的窄门通向大海，数百万非洲人从这里被装上运奴船。粉红色殖民建筑与热带花卉掩盖不住历史的伤痛，戈雷岛是跨大西洋奴隶贸易最沉痛的见证，提醒人类勿忘这段黑暗历史。
pictures.full_text_en: In the jungles of the Yucatán Peninsula, the Maya pyramid El Castillo casts serpent-shaped shadows at the spring and autumn equinoxes. The feathered serpent god Kukulcán winds down the staircase, stone rings on the ballcourt bear witness to life-or-death games, and the precision of Maya astronomical calendars is awe-inspiring.

pictures.title: 肯尼亚图尔卡纳湖
pictures.summary: 肯尼亚西北部的图尔卡纳湖是世界上最干旱地区的大湖，碧绿湖水在...
pictures.full_text: 肯尼亚西北部的图尔卡纳湖是世界上最干旱地区的大湖，碧绿湖水在火山岩环绕中闪耀。古人类学家在此发现了距今二百五十万年的能人化石，图尔卡纳湖地区是人类起源研究最重要的化石产地之一。
pictures.full_text_en: The Galápagos Islands in the Pacific are a living laboratory of evolution. Giant tortoises crawl slowly over volcanic rock, marine iguanas dive to graze on seaweed, and blue-footed boobies perform comical courtship dances. Darwin found inspiration here and wrote On the Origin of Species, which changed the world.

pictures.title: 南非罗本岛
pictures.summary: 开普敦外海的罗本岛曾是政治犯的流放地，曼德拉在此被关押十八年...
pictures.full_text: 开普敦外海的罗本岛曾是政治犯的流放地，曼德拉在此被关押十八年。狭小的牢房中他坚持学习与写作，领导反种族隔离运动。罗本岛如今是博物馆，见证了人类对自由与尊严的不屈追求。
pictures.full_text_en: Iguazu Falls on the Argentina-Brazil border consists of 275 waterfalls, with the Devil's Throat section being the most ferocious. Mist billows like a storm, rainbows rise and fall among the cascades, and subtropical rainforest surrounds this aquatic wonder—a breathtaking spectacle.

pictures.title: 坦桑尼亚恩戈罗恩戈罗
pictures.summary: 恩戈罗恩戈罗火山口直径二十公里，是世界最大的完整火山口。口内...
pictures.full_text: 恩戈罗恩戈罗火山口直径二十公里，是世界最大的完整火山口。口内草原、湖泊与森林共存，狮子与犀牛在火山口底部漫步，马赛牧民赶着牛群在火山口边缘放牧，这里是非洲野生动物与人类共生的独特景观。
pictures.full_text_en: Yellowstone in Wyoming has the world's largest geyser basin, with Old Faithful erupting every 90 minutes. Grand Prismatic Spring is as colorful as a palette, bison graze leisurely beside sulfur pools, and a supervolcano beneath the caldera holds immense geological energy.

pictures.title: 埃及阿布辛贝神庙
pictures.summary: 拉美西斯二世在尼罗河畔凿山建造了阿布辛贝神庙，四尊二十米高的...
pictures.full_text: 拉美西斯二世在尼罗河畔凿山建造了阿布辛贝神庙，四尊二十米高的法老坐像守卫着入口。每年两次阳光穿透六十米深的神殿照亮内室的三尊神像，联合国教科文组织主导将神庙整体搬迁以躲避阿斯旺水坝的淹没。
pictures.full_text_en: At the entrance to New York Harbor, the Statue of Liberty holds her torch high, tablet of independence in hand, her copper-green robes fluttering in the sea breeze. This statue, a gift from France to the United States, stands 93 meters tall, symbolizing freedom and democracy, and once welcomed millions of immigrants to the New World.

pictures.title: 摩洛哥非斯老城
pictures.summary: 非斯老城是世界上最古老且持续有人居住的中世纪城市，九千条巷道...
pictures.full_text: 非斯老城是世界上最古老且持续有人居住的中世纪城市，九千条巷道如迷宫般曲折。皮革染坊中石缸排列如调色板，铜匠在铺面中敲打出精美的灯盏，卡拉维因大学建于公元八五九年，是世界上最古老的持续运营大学。
pictures.full_text_en: Sugarloaf Mountain stands at the entrance to Guanabara Bay, and Christ the Redeemer spreads his arms overlooking Rio. Copacabana Beach stretches with white sand, Tijuca Forest is the world's largest urban rainforest, and the magnificent landscape where mountains meet sea makes Rio de Janeiro one of the world's most beautiful cities.

pictures.title: 黄石国家公园
pictures.summary: 怀俄明州的黄石公园拥有世界上最大的间歇泉群，老忠实泉每隔九十...
pictures.full_text: 怀俄明州的黄石公园拥有世界上最大的间歇泉群，老忠实泉每隔九十分钟喷发一次。大棱镜温泉色彩斑斓如调色板，野牛群在硫磺池旁悠闲吃草，火山口下的超级火山蕴藏着巨大的地质能量。
pictures.full_text_en: Lake Louise in Banff National Park is an emerald set among snow peaks, and the Icefields Parkway winds along the Columbia Icefield. Grizzly bears forage in coniferous forests, elk drink by streams, and the glaciers and lakes of the Rocky Mountains form North America's most magnificent natural landscape.

pictures.title: 自由女神像
pictures.summary: 纽约港入口处的自由女神像高擎火炬，铜绿色长袍在海风中飘动。法...
pictures.full_text: 纽约港入口处的自由女神像高擎火炬，铜绿色长袍在海风中飘动。法国赠送给美国的这座雕像高九十三米，是自由与民主的象征，曾迎接数百万移民踏上新大陆，美国精神的标志矗立海天之间。
pictures.full_text_en: Iguazu Falls consists of 275 waterfalls, with the Devil's Throat section being the most ferocious. Mist billows like a storm, rainbows rise and fall among the cascades, and subtropical rainforest surrounds this aquatic wonder—South America's most spectacular natural heritage is awe-inspiring.

pictures.title: 巴西里约热内卢山海景观
pictures.summary: 面包山矗立在瓜纳巴拉湾入口，基督像张开双臂俯瞰里约城。科帕卡...
pictures.full_text: 面包山矗立在瓜纳巴拉湾入口，基督像张开双臂俯瞰里约城。科帕卡巴纳海滩白沙绵延，蒂茹卡森林是城市中最大的都市雨林，山海交融的壮丽景观让里约热内卢成为世界上最美丽的城市之一。
pictures.full_text_en: The Spanish colonial architecture of Old Havana is weathered yet retains its charm, with vintage cars slowly crossing the plazas. Morro Castle guards the harbor entrance, Hemingway's favorite La Bodeguita del Medio is still open, and Caribbean breezes blow through 500-year-old streets—time slows down here.

pictures.title: 加拿大落基山公园群
pictures.summary: 班夫国家公园的露易丝湖如翡翠镶嵌在雪山之间，冰原大道沿哥伦比...
pictures.full_text: 班夫国家公园的露易丝湖如翡翠镶嵌在雪山之间，冰原大道沿哥伦比亚冰原蜿蜒而行。灰熊在针叶林中觅食，麋鹿在溪流旁饮水，落基山脉的冰川与湖泊构成了北美最壮丽的自然景观。
pictures.full_text_en: The Pyramid of the Sun at Teotihuacan rises 65 meters, with the Pyramid of the Moon and Temple of the Feathered Serpent arrayed along the Avenue of the Dead in imposing grandeur. This largest pre-Columbian city in the Americas once housed 200,000 people. The Aztecs called it the City of Gods, and its builders remain unidentified.

pictures.title: 古巴哈瓦那老城
pictures.summary: 哈瓦那老城的西班牙殖民建筑虽已斑驳却风韵犹存，广场上老爷车缓...
pictures.full_text: 哈瓦那老城的西班牙殖民建筑虽已斑驳却风韵犹存，广场上老爷车缓缓驶过。莫罗城堡扼守港湾入口，海明威常去的五分钱小酒馆至今仍在营业，加勒比海的风吹过五百年的街巷，时间在此放慢了脚步。
pictures.full_text_en: Cartagena on the Caribbean coast is encircled by thick walls, with exquisite colonial-era colored balconies and carved wooden lintels. Castillo San Felipe once resisted pirates and British fleets, and García Márquez drew inspiration for magical realism here. The old city is Colombia's cultural treasure.

pictures.title: 墨西哥特奥蒂瓦坎
pictures.summary: 特奥蒂瓦坎的太阳金字塔高六十五米，沿亡者大道排列的月亮金字塔...
pictures.full_text: 特奥蒂瓦坎的太阳金字塔高六十五米，沿亡者大道排列的月亮金字塔与羽蛇神庙气势恢宏。这座美洲最大的前哥伦布城市曾容纳二十万人口，阿兹特克人将其视为诸神之城，其建造者至今身份不明。
pictures.full_text_en: The capital of the Inca Empire, Cusco, sits at 3,400 meters in the Andes, with Inca walls of polygonal megaliths fitted seamlessly without mortar. The Spanish built Baroque churches atop Inca walls, and two civilizations layer and merge in one city. Cusco is the heart of Andean civilization in South America.

pictures.title: 哥伦比亚卡塔赫纳老城
pictures.summary: 加勒比海岸的卡塔赫纳被厚重的城墙环绕，殖民时期的彩色阳台与木...
pictures.full_text: 加勒比海岸的卡塔赫纳被厚重的城墙环绕，殖民时期的彩色阳台与木雕门楣精美绝伦。圣费利佩城堡曾抵御海盗与英国舰队的进攻，加西亚·马尔克斯在此汲取了魔幻现实主义的灵感，古城是哥伦比亚的文化瑰宝。
pictures.title_en: Independence Hall of the United States
pictures.full_text_en: Philadelphia's Independence Hall is where the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution were signed, and where George Washington took command of the Continental Army. In this modest red-brick building, the first modern democratic republic in human history was born, and the crack in the Liberty Bell became an eternal symbol of the pursuit of equality.

pictures.title: 秘鲁库斯科古城
pictures.summary: 印加帝国的首都库斯科坐落在安第斯山脉海拔三千四百米处，印加石...
pictures.full_text: 印加帝国的首都库斯科坐落在安第斯山脉海拔三千四百米处，印加石墙以多边形巨石精密契合无缝隙。西班牙人在印加城墙上建造了巴洛克教堂，两种文明在同一座城市中层叠交融，库斯科是南美安第斯文明的心脏。
pictures.full_text_en: Old Quebec on the St. Lawrence River is North America's only walled city, with the Château Frontenac standing like a fairy tale on the promontory. The cobblestone streets and French boutiques of Petit Champlain make one feel transported to Paris. The culture of New France has endured on the North American continent for four hundred years.

pictures.title: 美国独立厅
pictures.summary: 费城独立厅是《独立宣言》与美国宪法的签署地，乔治·华盛顿在此...
pictures.full_text: 费城独立厅是《独立宣言》与美国宪法的签署地，乔治·华盛顿在此就任大陆军总司令。简朴的红砖建筑中诞生了人类历史上第一个现代民主共和国，自由钟的裂纹成为追求平等的永恒象征。
pictures.full_text_en: Easter Island in the Pacific stands with 887 moai statues, the tallest reaching 10 meters and weighing 75 tons. The Rapa Nui people carved and transported these colossal figures using Stone Age tools. Most statues face inland, gazing upon tribal lands. The rise and fall of the island's civilization is a profound allegory of the relationship between humanity and nature.

pictures.title: 加拿大魁北克老城
pictures.summary: 圣劳伦斯河畔的魁北克老城是北美唯一的城墙城市，芳堤娜城堡酒店...
pictures.full_text: 圣劳伦斯河畔的魁北克老城是北美唯一的城墙城市，芳堤娜城堡酒店如童话矗立于岬角之上。小香普兰街的石板路与法式店铺让人恍若置身巴黎，新法兰西的文化在北美大陆上延续了四百年。
pictures.full_text_en: The Galápagos Islands in the Pacific are a living laboratory of evolution. Giant tortoises crawl slowly over volcanic rock, marine iguanas dive to graze on seaweed, and blue-footed boobies perform comical courtship dances. Darwin found inspiration here and wrote On the Origin of Species, which changed the world. The archipelago is the holy land where the theory of natural selection was born.

pictures.title: 智利复活节岛
pictures.summary: 太平洋上的复活节岛矗立着八百八十七尊摩艾石像，最高达十米重七...
pictures.full_text: 太平洋上的复活节岛矗立着八百八十七尊摩艾石像，最高达十米重七十五吨。拉帕努伊人用石器时代的工具雕刻和运输这些巨像，石像大多面朝内陆凝视着部落的土地，岛上的文明兴衰是人类与自然关系的深刻寓言。
pictures.full_text_en: Cocos Island lies hidden in the depths of the Pacific, with waterfalls cascading from mist-shrouded cliffs into the sea. Sharks patrol underwater reefs, and schools of hammerheads parade through ocean currents. Legend says pirates buried countless treasures here. Cocos Island is one of the most pristine tropical islands on Earth.

pictures.title: 厄瓜多尔加拉帕戈斯
pictures.summary: 太平洋上的加拉帕戈斯群岛是进化的活实验室。巨龟在火山岩上缓慢...
pictures.full_text: 太平洋上的加拉帕戈斯群岛是进化的活实验室。巨龟在火山岩上缓慢爬行，海鬣蜥潜入海底啃食海藻，蓝脚鲣鸟跳着滑稽的求偶舞。达尔文在此获得灵感写出了改变世界的《物种起源》，群岛是自然选择理论诞生的圣地。
pictures.title_en: Los Glaciares National Park of Argentina
pictures.full_text_en: The Perito Moreno Glacier on the Patagonian plateau stretches 30 kilometers, with ice-blue walls towering 60 meters high. Massive ice blocks calve into the lake from time to time, with thunderous roars. The glacier still advances slowly, locked in continuous battle with warm lake waters. South America's most spectacular glacial wonder inspires awe.

pictures.title: 哥斯达黎加科科岛
pictures.summary: 科科岛隐藏在太平洋深处，瀑布从云雾缭绕的山崖倾泻入海。鲨鱼在...
pictures.full_text: 科科岛隐藏在太平洋深处，瀑布从云雾缭绕的山崖倾泻入海。鲨鱼在海底岩礁间巡游，锤头鲨群在洋流中列队而过。传说海盗在此埋藏了无数宝藏，科科岛是地球上最原始的热带岛屿之一。
pictures.full_text_en: The Great Smoky Mountains at the southern end of the Appalachians are perennially shrouded in mist, and the ancient range nurtures the world's richest temperate biodiversity. Autumn sets the mountains ablaze with red foliage, black bears forage in the forests, and fireflies flash in synchrony on summer nights like a river of stars. The Great Smokies is the most visited national park in the United States.

pictures.title: 阿根廷冰川国家公园
pictures.summary: 巴塔哥尼亚高原上的莫雷诺冰川绵延三十公里，冰蓝色的冰壁高耸六...
pictures.full_text: 巴塔哥尼亚高原上的莫雷诺冰川绵延三十公里，冰蓝色的冰壁高耸六十米。巨大的冰块不时崩塌入湖，轰鸣声如雷震耳。冰川仍在缓慢推进，与温暖湖水持续交锋，南美大陆最壮观的冰川奇景令人敬畏。
pictures.full_text_en: The Great Barrier Reef off Australia's northeastern coast stretches 2,300 kilometers, composed of 3,000 coral reefs and 900 islands. Coral polyps have built a living wonder visible from space, clownfish dart among sea anemones, green sea turtles nest on the reefs. The Great Barrier Reef is Earth's largest biological structure and a paradise for marine life.

pictures.title: 美国大烟山国家公园
pictures.summary: 阿巴拉契亚山脉南端的大烟山常年云雾缭绕，古老的山脉孕育了世界...
pictures.full_text: 阿巴拉契亚山脉南端的大烟山常年云雾缭绕，古老的山脉孕育了世界上最丰富的温带生物多样性。秋日漫山红叶如火，黑熊在林间觅食，萤火虫在夏夜同步闪烁如星河，大烟山是美国游客最多的国家公园。
pictures.full_text_en: The Sydney Opera House on the harbor unfolds like layered white sails, Jørn Utzon's design inspired by orange segments. The shell structure uses 15,000 Swedish tiles, and from above it resembles a blooming lotus. The Sydney Opera House is the most iconic building of the twentieth century and Australia's cultural emblem.
